title: Grid Phase-Decoupling Matrix: Maximum-Determinant Sign Design
strategies: trivial: normalised triangular +/-1 matrix (|det| = 2^(N-1)), reproduces the checker baseline (~0.1)
greedy: top-left N x N block of the smallest Sylvester-Hadamard matrix of order 2^k >= N, normalised (optimal at powers of two)
strong: seeded single-flip hill-climbing on the exact Bareiss determinant with random restarts, beating the Sylvester seed at non-Hadamard sizes
expert: Paley / Williamson / conference-matrix constructions and near-optimal maximal-determinant designs for N not a power of two
